_doc: Durable reservoir of distinct data-story subjects the author draws from so the queue never starves against the already-covered catalogue. author_stories picks topics here that don't overlap existing stories, then writes a full 4-segment story for each. Extend this list any time; used topics are detected automatically (they become covered stories), no manual bookkeeping needed.
